personal_info.name: Vishwa Patel
personal_info.profile_summary: Building AI systems, breaking them, improving them and repeating the cycle until something cool happens.

work_experience.title: Jr. AI Engineer
responsibilities: Worked on Player churn prediction system and user behavior analysis for ibetting/igaming platform which will be used for player retention analysis.

Designed and deployed a multi-agent customer support chatbot for a casino platform using LangChain, LangGraph, Pydantic, and enabling LLM-powered RAG, multilingual conversations, and orchestration across 10+ systems.
Built robust orchestration and state management pipelines with dynamic agent routing, structured validation, and extended capabilities such as OCR, Turkish translation.
Led development of an agentic AI trading bot, integrating LLMs with real-time market data for autonomous trading and decision-making.
Enhanced an image recognition system for facial matching across large datasets, significantly improving model accuracy.
Developed a chat reply recommendation engine leveraging NLP, semantic similarity, and a LoRA fine-tuned BERT model.
Trained and evaluated deep learning architectures (GRU, LSTM, GRU-LSTM hybrid, CNN) for cryptocurrency price prediction using TensorFlow and Keras, conducting comparative performance analysis.
Built an MVP for English to Dari and Dari to English speech and text translation using libraries and models.
Utilized Python libraries including Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, and PyTorch for data analysis, model training, and experimentation.
Delivered production-ready, scalable AI systems through collaboration with DevOps, product, and business teams, ensuring reliability, performance, and cost efficiency.

work_experience.title: AI/ML Intern
responsibilities: Developed and enhanced StudyBot AI, an intelligent education assistant for IELTS and SSC exam modules, focusing on data collection, question-answer generation, and automated answer validation using LLMs.
Built and deployed RESTful APIs with Flask, FastAPI, and Uvicorn, integrating GPT and LLaMA models to enable intelligent grading and evaluation systems.
Engaged in Prompt Engineering, NLP, web scraping, and automation tasks to streamline workflows, improve data quality, and enhance overall AI system efficiency.

work_experience.title: AI/ML Intern
responsibilities: Developed core modules for Shruti AI Engine, an LLM-powered business analysis assistant integrating Smart Search Engines (SSE) for intelligent data retrieval and insights.
Implemented feature engineering, data validation, and RAG pipelines, enabling summarization, semantic similarity matching, and text analytics.
Collaborated within Agile teams using Git, GitHub, JIRA, and other DevOps tools to ensure efficient version control, sprint planning, and project delivery.

work_experience.title: ASR Vetting Intern
responsibilities: Validated ASR (Automatic Speech Recognition) outputs for Super Bot, ensuring high transcription accuracy between audio inputs and generated text.
Performed quality control and data curation on NLP datasets used for training and evaluation, contributing to improved language model accuracy and performance.

research_paper.title: Predict Student Learning Using a Virtual Educational Game
research_paper.description: Conducted research on predicting student performance through machine learning in a virtual educational game environment (Jo Wilder and the Capitol Case).
points: Developed and evaluated six predictive models including KNN, Random Forest, MLP, CNN, and LSTM to analyze gameplay and clickstream data.
Achieved an F1-score of 0.83 and accuracy of 0.74 using an MLP model, outperforming baseline approaches.
Implemented feature engineering, data aggregation, and RAG pipelines to enhance model accuracy.
Explored student behavior patterns, identifying correlations between engagement time, day of the week, and learning outcomes.
Proposed applications for personalized learning recommendations and adaptive educational technologies.

extracurricular_activities: NSS (National Service Scheme) Volunteer & Student Coordinator – Led volunteer initiatives, managed student teams, and organized social outreach programs.
NCC (National Cadet Corps) Cadet – Participated in disciplined training programs focused on leadership, discipline, teamwork, and national service.
National-Level Athlete & Team Captain – 4-time Nationals participant in Kho-Kho and Athletics, served as team captain twice.
Campus Ambassador - SVEEP (Systematic Voters' Education and Electoral Participation) – Promoted voter awareness and civic participation among students.
Hackathon Participant – Competed in multiple regional and national hackathons, contributing to AI/ML and problem-solving projects.
